title: Thai Tofu Gratin
description: A creamy Thai-inspired gratin dish made with crispy tofu and gooey sauce. Best served hot and fresh.
instructions: Grease a 9x9-inch baking dish with coconut oil.
In a large mixing bowl, combine cubed tofu, chopped bitter leaves, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, prepare the gooey sauce according to the following recipe:
- Combine 1/2 cup water, 1/4 cup coconut cream, 1 tbsp soy sauce, and 1 tsp Thai chili flakes in a saucepan.
- Bring to a boil over medium heat.
- Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, or until the sauce thickens.
- Stir in 1 tsp grated ginger and 1 tsp honey.
Pour the gooey sauce over the tofu mixture and stir to combine.
Transfer the tofu mixture to the prepared baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
